name: spotify-playlist-ts
description: Fetches Spotify playlists, retrieves track metadata, and downloads matching songs as MP3 files from Youtube. Downloaded music is automatically organized into a clean folder hierarchy: Artist -> Album -> Song.

scripts.icons:generate: rm -rf build/icon.iconset build/icon.icns build/icon.png build/icon.ico && mkdir -p build && sips -z 1024 1024 public/icon.jpg --out build/icon.png && cp build/icon.png build/icon.ico && mkdir -p build/icon.iconset && for size in 16 32 64 128 256 512; do sips -z "$size" "$size" public/icon.jpg --out "build/icon.iconset/icon_${size}x${size}.png"; if [ "$size" -ge 16 ]; then sips -z "$((size * 2))" "$((size * 2))" public/icon.jpg --out "build/icon.iconset/icon_${size}x${size}@2x.png"; fi; done && iconutil -c icns build/icon.iconset -o build/icon.icns
